title: The Promise to Grow Stronger: Rising Conflict
description: In the Post-War / ASL Flashback storyline, this section centers on Sanji, Whitebeard, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #17 as the scene develops across pages 13–16.
scene: This scene advances the Post-War / ASL Flashback conflict through Sanji, Whitebeard, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, focusing on the immediate stakes of the promise to grow stronger: rising conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Whew... yeah, you're no good. Too vulgar.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Captain!! The Marines have come into view!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: But that is all over now...

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Red Line: Holy Land of MarieJoa

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Don't you start getting all cocky, now...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Since when are you my superior, eh?
